title: 24/7在线代理批量向外贸企业配送订单
description: 拥有二十多年外贸SaaS经验的企业如何利用Agent来简化从获客到成交的整个流程？
titleZh: 24/7在线代理批量向外贸企业配送订单
titleEn: 24/7 Online Agent Delivers Orders to Foreign Trade Enterprises in Batches
descriptionZh: 拥有二十多年外贸SaaS经验的企业如何利用Agent来简化从获客到成交的整个流程？
descriptionEn: How can an enterprise with over two decades of experience in foreign trade SaaS use an Agent to streamline the entire process from customer acquisition to deal closure? Futong Tianxia deeply integrates Tencent Cloud ClawPro, the intelligent agent development platform ADP, and CodeBuddy into its business operations, enabling the Agent to conduct background checks, evaluate leads, generate quotes, and provide 24/7 multilingual automatic replies. After being adopted by 60,000 foreign trade enterprises, the conversion rate has doubled.
